category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Ecuador.

title.en: China-to-Ecuador EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入厄瓜多尔：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入厄瓜多：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Ecuador INEN conformity requirements, ARCERNNR / ARCONEL grid-code obligations, CNEL EP utility coordination, IEC 61851 safety and EMC standards, connector ecosystem considerations (IEC 62196 Type 2 AC / CCS2 DC and Americas context), OCPP interoperability, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 baselines. Ecuador operates on 120 V / 60 Hz — substantively different from China's domestic 220 V / 50 Hz baseline.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与厄瓜多尔INEN合格评定要求、ARCERNNR / ARCONEL电网规范义务、CNEL EP电力协调、IEC 61851安全及EMC标准、接口生态系统考量（IEC 62196 Type 2交流 / CCS2直流及美洲背景）、OCPP互操作，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基线的差距对照。厄瓜多尔采用120 V / 60 Hz供电，与中国国内220 V / 50 Hz基线存在实质性差异。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與厄瓜多INEN合格評定要求、ARCERNNR / ARCONEL電網規範義務、CNEL EP電力協調、IEC 61851安全及EMC標準、接口生態系統考量（IEC 62196 Type 2交流 / CCS2直流及美洲背景）、OCPP互操作，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基線的差距對照。厄瓜多採用120 V / 60 Hz供電，與中國國內220 V / 50 Hz基線存在實質性差異。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Ecuador, the confirmed practical gaps are: (1) grid voltage and frequency — Ecuador operates on 120 V single-phase / 60 Hz (not 220–380 V / 50 Hz), requiring hardware input-range redesign and derating confirmation; (2) connector physical incompatibility — GB/T 20234 connectors are physically and electrically incompatible with IEC 62196 Type 2 (AC) and CCS2 (DC) couplers, which are the IEC-aligned connectors currently used by private charging networks in Ecuador, though Ecuador has not mandated a single national connector standard as of 2026-06-14; (3) INEN conformity — imported electrical equipment requires an INEN Certificate of Conformity (INEN-1) from an accredited body before customs clearance; whether EV chargers are currently subject to a specific RTE INEN mandatory technical regulation could not be confirmed from official sources and should be verified with INEN directly; (4) ARCERNNR / ARCONEL grid-code compliance — grid-connected installations must satisfy Ecuadorian grid-code requirements (ref. ARCERNNR-002/20); (5) Ecuador's EV charging market is nascent and has experienced serious electricity supply disruptions (rolling blackouts in 2024 due to hydroelectric drought); exporters should evaluate operational risk and local utility coordination with CNEL EP or the relevant distribution company before deployment.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入厄瓜多尔时，已确认的实务差距包括：(1) 电网电压和频率——厄瓜多尔采用120 V单相 / 60 Hz（非220–380 V / 50 Hz），需要硬件输入范围重新设计和降额确认；(2) 接口物理不兼容——GB/T 20234接口与IEC 62196 Type 2（交流）和CCS2（直流）耦合器在物理和电气层面均不兼容，而IEC体系接口是厄瓜多尔私营充电网络目前使用的主流标准，但截至2026年6月14日，厄瓜多尔尚未强制规定单一国家接口标准；(3) INEN合格评定——进口电气设备在清关前须持有认可机构签发的INEN合格证书（INEN-1）；电动汽车充电桩目前是否须遵守具体的RTE INEN强制技术法规，未能从官方来源确认，应直接向INEN核实；(4) ARCERNNR / ARCONEL电网规范合规——并网安装须满足厄瓜多尔电网规范要求（参见ARCERNNR-002/20）；(5) 厄瓜多尔电动汽车充电市场尚处于起步阶段，2024年因水电干旱曾发生严重电力供应中断（轮流停电），出口商在部署前应评估运营风险，并与CNEL EP或相关配电公司进行本地电力协调。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入厄瓜多時，已確認的實務差距包括：(1) 電網電壓和頻率——厄瓜多採用120 V單相 / 60 Hz（非220–380 V / 50 Hz），需要硬體輸入範圍重新設計和降額確認；(2) 接口物理不兼容——GB/T 20234接口與IEC 62196 Type 2（交流）和CCS2（直流）耦合器在物理和電氣層面均不兼容，而IEC體系接口是厄瓜多私營充電網絡目前使用的主流標準，但截至2026年6月14日，厄瓜多尚未強制規定單一國家接口標準；(3) INEN合格評定——進口電氣設備在清關前須持有認可機構簽發的INEN合格證書（INEN-1）；電動汽車充電樁目前是否須遵守具體的RTE INEN強制技術法規，未能從官方來源確認，應直接向INEN核實；(4) ARCERNNR / ARCONEL電網規範合規——併網安裝須滿足厄瓜多電網規範要求（參見ARCERNNR-002/20）；(5) 厄瓜多電動汽車充電市場尚處於起步階段，2024年因水電乾旱曾發生嚴重電力供應中斷（輪流停電），出口商在部署前應評估運營風險，並與CNEL EP或相關配電公司進行本地電力協調。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, INEN scope determination, ARCERNNR / ARCONEL approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, network operators, and installers should verify current Ecuador INEN conformity assessment rules, applicable RTE INEN technical regulations, ARCERNNR / ARCONEL grid-code requirements, CNEL EP utility coordination requirements, IEC standard editions, and installation rules with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、INEN适用范围裁定、ARCERNNR / ARCONEL批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、网络运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行厄瓜多尔INEN合格评定规则、适用的RTE INEN技术法规、ARCERNNR / ARCONEL电网规范要求、CNEL EP电力协调要求、IEC标准版本及安装规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、INEN適用範圍裁定、ARCERNNR / ARCONEL批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、網絡運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行厄瓜多INEN合格評定規則、適用的RTE INEN技術法規、ARCERNNR / ARCONEL電網規範要求、CNEL EP電力協調要求、IEC標準版本及安裝規則。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
